overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), transitioning from a covered underpass beneath elevated highways through sunlit intersections and industrial corridors. The scene features towering skyscrapers, neon billboards, and sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic in a high-tech urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered underpass beneath massive concrete highway structures, passing corporate buildings and neon barriers

entered.detail: dark corporate building with illuminated 'ARASAKA CORPORATION' signage
large triple-screen billboard displaying 'Night City' text and animated character advertisements
glowing green neon barrier running parallel to the walkway
massive concrete highway overpass creating shadowed canopy overhead
tall metal street lamp with orange fixture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a shadowed pedestrian walkway beneath a massive concrete highway overpass. The Arasaka Corporation building looms on the left with bright signage, while a glowing green neon security fence lines the right. A large digital billboard spans the overhead structure ahead, displaying advertisements for Night City.

events.description: exits covered underpass into bright sunlight of open urban intersection
crossing multi-lane road as vehicles pass by in the distance

agents.ego_description: stepping out of the shadows into sunlight and crossing the wide urban intersection toward towering skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscraper with glass facade dominating the skyline
curving concrete highway ramp with metal railings
multiple stacked digital screens displaying various advertisements
green illuminated food truck with service window

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into bright morning sunlight, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection. The camera crosses the asphalt crosswalk toward a towering skyscraper in the distance, passing digital billboards and a green food vendor truck. A sedan drives through the intersection as the elevated highway ramp curves overhead.

events.description: red sports car and sedan pass by on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, observing passing traffic and street vendors

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past on the street

entered.detail: tall illuminated sign reading 'BUCK-A-SLICE' with pizza advertisement
cluster of street food stalls with green neon lighting
tall metal electrical transmission tower with multiple cross-arms

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive concrete highway overpass, the scene takes on a darker, industrial tone. The prominent 'BUCK-A-SLICE' billboard stands on the left while food vendor stalls with green neon lighting line the right. Vehicles including a red sports car pass by on the road as power transmission towers become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with power transmission lines

events.description: entering industrial zone with dense power lines and transmission towers

agents.ego_description: continuing along the industrial street beneath power lines, passing pedestrians on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket and white cap walking toward the camera while talking on phone

entered.detail: series of massive black metal electrical towers with complex wire networks
metal scaffolding structure attached to industrial building
low concrete divider separating sidewalk from road

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a distinctly industrial corridor dominated by massive power transmission towers and crisscrossing electrical lines. The elevated highway continues overhead to the left while pedestrians walk along the right sidewalk. The environment features concrete barriers, industrial scaffolding, and a more utilitarian urban aesthetic compared to the commercial areas earlier.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a shadowed urban underpass into a bright city intersection before settling into a gritty industrial corridor. It begins in a dim pedestrian walkway beneath a concrete highway overpass, flanked by the glowing signage of the Arasaka Corporation and a green neon security fence. As the camera emerges from the cover into bright morning sunlight, the scene opens into a wide intersection where the view expands to include a distant skyscraper, a green food vendor truck, and a sedan crossing the asphalt. The perspective then shifts back beneath the massive concrete ramps, where the lighting darkens and the environment takes on a commercial-industrial tone marked by a Buck-a-Slice billboard and passing sports cars. Finally, the camera moves forward into a utilitarian corridor dominated by massive power transmission towers and crisscrossing electrical lines, passing concrete barriers and scaffolding under the lingering shadow of the elevated highway.
